item.title: OC comic reposts- help me pay emergency vet bills
item.description:
Everyone always jokes “there’s no way it was just alcohol” but as a reminder friends ✨ autism ✨ (it was basically a stim for me). The glow sticks were luckily the non toxic ones but they stained the shit out of my clothes and skin as they lost their glow.
I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted the last three days about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. He had to have two separate emergency surgeries totaling $13,000. We don’t even know if he will make it. The vets had us optimistic which is why we proceeded to save his life, but we got an update it’s about 50/50 now as he just got of his second surgery. we have about 10k of the 12k vet bills covered, we are almost to the full amount. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the first life-saving surgery. Unfortunately though he needed another surgery (yesterday) and it didn’t go the way they planned. He has about 50/50 chance of making it. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards these two emergency surgeries would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc https://www.paypal.me/KristieLaneK
we are maxed out on our vet bills and are going no further. I hate to say it, but the vets were not very honest with us about the price of things, they gave us two quotes for two emergency surgeries and ended up going over them by double the amount each. I pray Atreyu makes it. He’s on ice as he has a fever, it’s still 50/50 but there’s not much else we can do. I am just so eternally thankful for the strangers on the Internet, no, my family on Imgur, who have allowed us to at least try to give him a second chance. We’ve been crying nonstop. Thank you all from the bottom of our hearts.
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: Out VS In Catwoman Cosplay
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here— wanted to share this fun comparison. I just rescued both of these kittens (Ivy on the left, Bruce on the right) about a week ago and I’m smitten. So here’s the “cat lady” playing with kittens, and Catwoman from one of my favorite photoshoots with my good friend Jerry Kestel.

item.title: Thursday Phone clearing dump (mostly GAMING memes)
item.description:
1
2
3. The Zuck saying the quite part out loud
4. Other team when seeing they have to play against me in Rainbow 6 Siege vs my team
5. What is the most violent game you played as a kid. For me it was probably Vice City. I mean you could use chainsaw...
6. Level 99 mullet
7. This...
8. Level 100 female warrior armor
9. well, there they are
10. Please import this!
11. HOW DARE YOU?!
12. Men live like this and see nothing wrong
13. I would play the shit out of this
14. How 90's games can save your life
15. If you have nothing better to do on a Thursday day you can try the demo of my "Stanley Parable"-inspired game. I think the humor and the cold distant voice of the narrator will keep you good company ! Plus you get not to press a button! Can you imagine all the fun you can have not doing that? It's one for the ages! You can try on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. It's a real game, I swear! (Pls wishlist uwu)

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1282
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/pPh0ZVM Wholesome Post 1281 https://imgur.com/gallery/j1xXdu2 Wholesome Post 1280 https://imgur.com/gallery/Ol4qWiL Wholesome Post 1279 https://imgur.com/gallery/MoQc2UR Wholesome Post 1278 https://imgur.com/gallery/u7gkSNN Wholesome Post 1277 https://imgur.com/gallery/PUAlS14 Wholesome Post 1276 https://imgur.com/gallery/N6scbuS Wholesome Post 1275
I include a fundraiser link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.modestneeds.org/features/ledger/viewapp.asp?source=BrowseRequest&mode=upd&rp=l&id=632152
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
item.dc:creator: ryanjoseph666

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a batch of memes as a love note. Dad jokes, words of affirmation, funnies, oddball humor, and jams. Here’s the latest batch randomly ordered. Enjoy.
item.description:
Be silly today.
Behave, dipshits.
This is what I sent them after one of them admitted he had our group chat on mute (so it didn’t chime during class).
Dad advice. Be aware of all four indicators, whether you are doing them or you are witnessing others doing them.
I love you. Hang in there.
Dad advice.
Morning jams! Make this the best day of your week.
Learn to be direct when the situation calls for it. Learn to be ok with others being direct with you. It’ll help. I promise.
Words of affirmation.
Be warm.
Be silly today.
It’s Wednesday. Here’s your morning jam.
Muhuhahahaha!
Be wary of the chickens today.
Drink your milk.
Sweet dreams. Good night.
Word of the day.
I’m done with today, too. Good night.
Take the chance anyway.
Today’s jam.
CHAAAAARRRRGGGEEE!! Attack the day.
Son #1 has a thing against glitter. He also has a beard. We tease him.
Have a good day today.
Hold on to your weird friends.
Good morning, monsters. I love you.
Have a rad day.
Be good to those you love today.
Don’t bring that shit in here. Psychos. Good night. Sweet dreams.
Aaaaaaaaaaa!!! Hahahahahaha!
It has LAYERS!
Dad joke! Hoo haha.
Your friends and work colleagues love me.
Not to be ableist, but how is a snake going to stride?
This is you two cooking for mom on Mother’s Day. Lol. Make sure to watch not just listen.
Be good to yourself today.
SHARKS WITH LEGS! Sweet dreams. Good night.
Makes you wonder why they don’t stop by and ring the doorbell. Maybe it’s because the blinds are open?
Wanna get matching tattoos?
Eek!
You’re doing great. I’m proud of you.
S-N-A-C-K-S?
This is every text of you two to each other. Dipshits.
Speed!
Good night. I sleepy.
Sneef zee foot.
I love you.
It’s DORA!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: just void screams
item.description: I usually see one or two panels of this comic, but never really the whole thing together - I've never known the source but I look at it every so often. I've been dealing with a lot of pressure from some family to be around who's been verbally and emotionally abusive and I refuse to to fold. With Mental Health thing going on, figured I'd scream into the void out of frustration. It's hard being an adult and seeing your parents flaws and their unwillingness to admit they're wrong or that they've been actively doing something to hurt you to make their own life easier.
item.dc:creator: cadetcypress

item.title: Ticking away the moments that make up a dull day
item.dc:creator: gambrill

item.title: Huge Opportunity! Finally working in my field!
item.description:
About 2 weeks ago I finally had an interview! Within days they gave me an offer, and now I'm gonna be in software testing!
Once I get past the training, they hire me on as an intern, so that's nice.
I've already got a degree in computer tech, so having another cert is just a huge bonus and will look really good on my resume in the future! Super excited. Also did I mention it's a paid internship?!
$50k is incredible! Especially because the 25th percentile in Canada for software testing is ~$40k/year. I feel like I can finally move forward with my life now! Today was the orientation/meeting the rest of my classmates/future coworkers and it went extremely well! I was able to make some good connections with current staff as well as some managers on the teams! I made some really good talking points and hope I left a great impression! Wish me luck Imgur! Tldr: got an incredible job opportunity and feel like I nailed the first day. FP Edit: I just want to say thank you to everyone for the support and kind words! Makes me feel a lot less nervous about this! For everyone who's concerned, the company that runs this program is legitimate and has been doing this program for the indigenous community since 2015 and was recommended to me by my job search case worker. I had done my research for this because I found it suspicious at first as well. We're all good here!

item.title: Random Stolen Meme Dumpp
item.description: FP Edit: Thank you and enjoy the rest of your week! As always, if you want learn how you can use your CPU/GPU power to help scientists develop new medicines then check out Folding@home: “Install our software to become a citizen scientist and contribute your compute power to help fight global health threats like COVID19, Alzheimer’s Disease, and cancer. Our software is completely free, easy to install, and safe to use.” - www.foldingathome.org Do your part and join up now!

item.title: Tell everyone it’s cause I’m the only nonbald guy in the family
item.dc:creator: Shenaniganz80

item.title: My mom died 3 weeks ago and these little guys have kept me looking up.
item.description:
Daisy, the mother I have been feeding outdoors for about 3 months. She gave birth to 6 adorable kitten's. I had built a nice warm shelter for her in hopes she'd have them there. She did! Unfortunately due to noise around here she moved them while I was at work about 3 weeks ago. I finally found them under a neighbor's shed and they were dry and warm and growing! I spent 2 weeks trying to get the kitten's used to me so I could capture them and hopefully find homes for them. One day last week, I noticed she was having health issues and she took off. Couldn't find her anywhere all night. Afraid she had abandoned them, I was able to get them and put them in a carrier. They were 5 weeks old by now. A couple of days later I was able to get Daisy to the vet and she's on the mend! Just an infection and my neighbor lady is now caring for her with plans to take care of spaying her since I covered the vet bill.
Working to get them to trust me by the she'd. Spent hours out there after work.
Captured and on their way to my home.
I built a walled in enclosure so they could run and play. Set up a huge kennel with toys and a scratching bunk for bedtime. Outside of it was a huge cat tree that my two cats have had for years. They always ended up in a pile after eating. They would constantly get picked up, belly rubbed and a nose kisses. They grew to love them.
Chiquita the talkative one and Luther down below.
Chiquita, Mousse ( the dark striped) and Luther enjoying the penthouse.
Mousse learning to trust. He was the most timid and shy so I made it a point to make him trust. By the end he was always the first to beg me to pick him up when I got home.
Twix
Mousse a work in progress. I fell in love with him and he with me.
Mousse waiting for his nose kiss.
Tbone telling me thanks for breakfast.
Ghosty
Luther asking for a belly rub and nose kiss after just getting one.
We pose gud?
Trying to stay awake after lunch.
I set up a camera so I could check in on them when I was at work.
Mousse looking like a car crash victim after lunch
Unfortunately Luther got a bath after getting rolled in poop by Mousse.
All dry and watching my dog.
These two were having trouble sleeping so I brought them up on my bed. Two minutes later they were crashed.
After an early breakfast they all gathered to watch me get ready for work, me not wanting to go.
Mousse begging to be picked back up and hugged. I've had them 2 weeks now and they've have made the loss of my mom a little easier. She taught me my lifelong love of animals. She's a reason I've always been part of the animal rescue. She always had 2 or 3 rescues when she was alive. I've weaned them and got them so used to humans and small children i know they're going to be great cats! Sadly, I can not keep them. I already have 2 cats and my dog (who loves cats and kittens) my friend's daughter has 2 cats and her dog. We just don't have the room, so fortunately, my vet, who is such a great guy, agreed to take them and help find them homes. He'll take care of vaccinations and dewormer. I just miss them so badly right now, being so used to spending several hours after work playing with them. I just wanted to share them with you guys. I do plan on checking back in two weeks and if Mousse is still available, I may just take him back, I'll find a way to make it work.
item.dc:creator: PrinceMaxx7
